# 💻 Code Snippet — Bash — Safe Script Template

**Date:** 2026-07-22

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

readonly SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
readonly SCRIPT_NAME="$(basename "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")"

log() { echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $*"; }
err() { log "ERROR: $*" >&2; }
die() { err "$*"; exit 1; }

main() {
    log "Starting ${SCRIPT_NAME}..."
    # Your code here
    log "Done."
}

main "$@"

```
